channel.title: Daily Reader
channel.description: A page a day from my reading list.

item.title: Differentiable Programming — Page 12
item.description: <!DOCTYPE html> <!-- Created by pdf2htmlEX (https://github.com/pdf2htmlEX/pdf2htmlEX) --> <html xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml"> <head> <meta charset="utf-8"/> <meta name="generator" content="pdf2htmlEX"/> <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge,chrome=1"/> <style type="text/css"> /*! * Base CSS for pdf2htmlEX * Copyright 2012,2013 Lu Wang <coolwanglu@gmail.com> * https://github.com/pdf2htmlEX/pdf2htmlEX/blob/master/share/LICENSE */#sidebar{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;width:250px;padding:0;margin:0;overflow:auto}#page-container{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;margin:0;padding:0;border:0}@media screen{#sidebar.opened+#page-container{left:250px}#page-container{bottom:0;right:0;overflow:auto}.loading-indicator{display:none}.loading-indicator.active{display:block;position:absolute;width:64px;height:64px;top:50%;left:50%;margin-top:-32px;margin-left:-32px}.loading-indicator img{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;right:0}}@media print{@page{margin:0}html{margin:0}body{margin:0;-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact}#sidebar{display:none}#page-container{width:auto;height:auto;overflow:visible;background-color:transparent}.d{display:none}}.pf{position:relative;background-color:white;overflow:hidden;margin:0;border:0}.pc{position:absolute;border:0;padding:0;margin:0;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;display:block;transform-origin:0 0;-ms-transform-origin:0 0;-webkit-transform-origin:0 0}.pc.opened{display:block}.bf{position:absolute;border:0;margin:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:100%;height:100%;-ms-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;user-select:none}.bi{position:absolute;border:0;margin:0;-ms-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;user-select:none}@media print{.pf{margin:0;box-shadow:none;page-break-after:always;page-break-inside:avoid}@-moz-document url-prefix(){.pf{overflow:visible;border:1px solid #fff}.pc{overflow:visible}}}.c{position:absolute;border:0;padding:0;margin:0;overflow:hidden;display:block}.t{position:absolute;white-space:pre;font-size:1px;transform-origin:0 100%;-ms-transform-origin:0 100%;-webkit-transform-origin:0 100%;unicode-bidi:bidi-override;-moz-font-feature-settings:"liga" 0}.t:after{content:''}.t:before{content:'';display:inline-block}.t span{position:relative;unicode-bidi:bidi-override}._{display:inline-block;color:transparent;z-index:-1}::selection{background:rgba(127,255,255,0.4)}::-moz-selection{background:rgba(127,255,255,0.4)}.pi{display:none}.d{position:absolute;transform-origin:0 100%;-ms-transform-origin:0 100%;-webkit-transform-origin:0 100%}.it{border:0;background-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.0)}.ir:hover{cursor:pointer}</style> <style type="text/css"> /*! * Fancy styles for pdf2htmlEX * Copyright 2012,2013 Lu Wang <coolwanglu@gmail.com> * https://github.com/pdf2htmlEX/pdf2htmlEX/blob/master/share/LICENSE */@keyframes fadein{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}@-webkit-keyframes fadein{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}@keyframes swing{0{transform:rotate(0)}10%{transform:rotate(0)}90%{transform:rotate(720deg)}100%{transform:rotate(720deg)}}@-webkit-keyframes swing{0{-webkit-transform:rotate(0)}10%{-webkit-transform:rotate(0)}90%{-webkit-transform:rotate(720deg)}100%{-webkit-transform:rotate(720deg)}}@media screen{#sidebar{background-color:#2f3236;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI0IiBoZWlnaHQ9IjQiPgo8cmVjdCB3aWR0aD0iNCIgaGVpZ2h0PSI0IiBmaWxsPSIjNDAzYzNmIj48L3JlY3Q+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wIDBMNCA0Wk00IDBMMCA0WiIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIxIiBzdHJva2U9IiMxZTI5MmQiPjwvcGF0aD4KPC9zdmc+")}#outline{font-family:Georgia,Times,"Times New Roman",serif;font-size:13px;margin:2em 1em}#outline ul{padding:0}#outline li{list-style-type:none;margin:1em 0}#outline li>ul{margin-left:1em}#outline a,#outline a:visited,#outline a:hover,#outline a:active{line-height:1.2;color:#e8e8e8;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;text-decoration:none;display:block;overflow:hidden;outline:0}#outline a:hover{color:#0cf}#page-container{background-color:#9e9e9e;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI1IiBoZWlnaHQ9IjUiPgo8cmVjdCB3aWR0aD0iNSIgaGVpZ2h0PSI1IiBmaWxsPSIjOWU5ZTllIj48L3JlY3Q+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0wIDVMNSAwWk02IDRMNCA2Wk0tMSAxTDEgLTFaIiBzdHJva2U9IiM4ODgiIHN0cm9rZS13aWR0aD0iMSI+PC9wYXRoPgo8L3N2Zz4=");-webkit-transition:left 500ms;transition:left 500ms}.pf{margin:13px auto;box-shadow:1px 1px 3px 1px #333;border-collapse:separate}.pc.opened{-webkit-animation:fadein 100ms;animation:fadein 100ms}.loading-indicator.active{-webkit-animation:swing 1.5s ease-in-out .01s infinite alternate none;animation:swing 1.5s ease-in-out .01s infinite alternate none}.checked{background:no-repeat url(data:image/png;base64,)}}</style> <style type="text/css"> .ff0{font-family:sans-serif;visibility:hidden;} @font-face{font-family:ff1;src:url('data:application/font-woff;base64,')format("woff");}.ff1{font-family:ff1;line-height:1.124000;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;visibility:visible;} @font-face{font-family:ff2;src:url('data:application/font-woff;base64,')format("woff");}.ff2{font-family:ff2;line-height:1.000000;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;visibility:visible;} @font-face{font-family:ff3;src:url('data:application/font-woff;base64,')format("woff");}.ff3{font-family:ff3;line-height:0.954000;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;visibility:visible;} @font-face{font-family:ff4;src:url('data:application/font-woff;base64,')format("woff");}.ff4{font-family:ff4;line-height:0.960000;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;visibility:visible;} @font-face{font-family:ff5;src:url('data:application/font-woff;base64,')format("woff");}.ff5{font-family:ff5;line-height:0.952000;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;visibility:visible;} @font-face{font-family:ff6;src:url('data:application/font-woff;base64,')format("woff");}.ff6{font-family:ff6;line-height:0.952000;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;visibility:visible;} @font-face{font-family:ff7;src:url('data:application/font-woff;base64,')format("woff");}.ff7{font-family:ff7;line-height:0.952000;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;visibility:visible;} @font-face{font-family:ff8;src:url('data:application/font-woff;base64,')format("woff");}.ff8{font-family:ff8;line-height:0.854000;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;visibility:visible;} .m0{transform:none;-ms-transform:none;-webkit-transform:none;} .m1{transform:matrix(1.111111,0.000000,0.000000,1.111111,0,0);-ms-transform:matrix(1.111111,0.000000,0.000000,1.111111,0,0);-webkit-transform:matrix(1.111111,0.000000,0.000000,1.111111,0,0);} .v2{vertical-align:-4.240000px;} .v0{vertical-align:0.000000px;} .v1{vertical-align:4.643333px;} .ls7{letter-spacing:0.000000px;} .ls3{letter-spacing:0.006222px;} .ls0{letter-spacing:0.006452px;} .ls2{letter-spacing:0.007333px;} .ls6{letter-spacing:0.554040px;} .ls4{letter-spacing:0.555691px;} .ls1{letter-spacing:0.556802px;} .ls5{letter-spacing:4.622024px;} .sc_{text-shadow:none;} .sc0{text-shadow:-0.015em 0 transparent,0 0.015em transparent,0.015em 0 transparent,0 -0.015em transparent;} @media screen and (-webkit-min-device-pixel-ratio:0){ .sc_{-webkit-text-stroke:0px transparent;} .sc0{-webkit-text-stroke:0.015em transparent;text-shadow:none;} } .wsb{word-spacing:-3.545118px;} .ws5{word-spacing:-3.409478px;} .ws9{word-spacing:-3.234932px;} .ws1c{word-spacing:-0.573850px;} .ws25{word-spacing:-0.382567px;} .ws4{word-spacing:-0.349093px;} .wsa{word-spacing:-0.229540px;} .ws12{word-spacing:-0.152917px;} .ws1e{word-spacing:-0.012752px;} .ws22{word-spacing:-0.001686px;} .ws23{word-spacing:0.000000px;} .ws8{word-spacing:0.011543px;} .ws24{word-spacing:0.012752px;} .ws11{word-spacing:0.013121px;} .wsf{word-spacing:0.255044px;} .wse{word-spacing:0.257606px;} .ws20{word-spacing:0.318806px;} .ws14{word-spacing:0.369814px;} .ws15{word-spacing:0.382567px;} .ws16{word-spacing:0.420823px;} .ws13{word-spacing:0.446328px;} .ws10{word-spacing:0.459080px;} .ws3{word-spacing:0.473353px;} .ws21{word-spacing:0.561098px;} .ws6{word-spacing:0.570186px;} .ws1f{word-spacing:0.599354px;} .ws2{word-spacing:0.651641px;} .ws1{word-spacing:0.739629px;} .ws1d{word-spacing:0.752381px;} .ws7{word-spacing:1.152008px;} .ws1b{word-spacing:1.236966px;} .wsc{word-spacing:1.466506px;} .wsd{word-spacing:1.471831px;} .ws17{word-spacing:1.479258px;} .ws18{word-spacing:1.485207px;} .ws1a{word-spacing:1.708798px;} .ws19{word-spacing:1.849072px;} .ws0{word-spacing:351.604271px;} ._0{margin-left:-2.665214px;} ._2{width:4.651817px;} ._1{width:6.402417px;} ._3{width:9.143343px;} .fc3{color:rgb(108,142,191);} .fc2{color:rgb(234,107,102);} .fc1{color:rgb(0,0,0);} .fc0{color:rgb(153,153,153);} .fs3{font-size:7.438778px;} .fs2{font-size:8.501556px;} .fs4{font-size:9.599556px;} .fs1{font-size:11.636444px;} .fs0{font-size:12.752222px;} .y0{bottom:-0.833333px;} .y1b{bottom:102.201111px;} .y1a{bottom:139.650000px;} .y19{bottom:160.262222px;} .y18{bottom:187.498889px;} .y17{bottom:203.550000px;} .y16{bottom:219.601111px;} .y15{bottom:235.651111px;} .y14{bottom:251.702222px;} .y13{bottom:267.753333px;} .y12{bottom:283.804444px;} .y11{bottom:299.855556px;} .y10{bottom:315.906667px;} .yf{bottom:331.956667px;} .ye{bottom:348.007778px;} .yd{bottom:364.058889px;} .yc{bottom:380.110000px;} .yb{bottom:407.346667px;} .ya{bottom:423.397778px;} .y9{bottom:439.448889px;} .y8{bottom:455.500000px;} .y7{bottom:471.550000px;} .y6{bottom:511.722222px;} .y5{bottom:526.777778px;} .y4{bottom:541.832222px;} .y3{bottom:556.886667px;} .y2{bottom:571.941111px;} .y1{bottom:766.625556px;} .ha{height:6.605635px;} .h5{height:8.564423px;} .h4{height:8.634242px;} .h3{height:9.742698px;} .h6{height:11.138522px;} .h2{height:11.323973px;} .h9{height:11.582966px;} .h7{height:11.584077px;} .h8{height:12.638270px;} .h0{height:880.000000px;} .h1{height:880.833333px;} .w0{width:680.000000px;} .w1{width:680.833333px;} .x0{left:0.000000px;} .x1{left:148.631111px;} .x2{left:163.070000px;} .x3{left:360.943333px;} </style> <script src="compatibility.min.js"></script> <script src="pdf2htmlEX.min.js"></script> <script> try{ pdf2htmlEX.defaultViewer = new pdf2htmlEX.Viewer({}); }catch(e){} </script> <title></title> </head> <body> <div id="sidebar"> <div id="outline"> </div> </div> <div id="page-container"> <div id="pfc" class="pf w0 h0" data-page-no="c"><div class="pc pcc w0 h0"><img class="bi x0 y0 w1 h1" alt="" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/><div class="t m0 x1 h2 y1 ff1 fs0 fc0 sc0 ls7 ws0">2<span class="_"> </span>Introduction</div><div class="t m0 x1 h3 y2 ff2 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws1">Figure<span class="_"> </span>F<span class="_ _0"></span>.1.1:<span class="_ _1"> </span><span class="ff3 fs1 ws2">For<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>task<span class="_"> </span>of<span class="_"> </span><span class="ff4 ws3">language<span class="_"> </span>modeling<span class="_"> </span></span>(i.e.,<span class="_"> </span>predicting<span class="_"> </span>text)<span class="_"> </span>performance,</span></div><div class="t m0 x1 h4 y3 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws4">evaluated<span class="_"> </span>here<span class="_"> </span>in<span class="_"> </span>terms<span class="_"> </span>of<span class="_"> </span><span class="ff4 ws5">perplexity</span>,<span class="_"> </span>has<span class="_"> </span>steadily<span class="_"> </span>decreased,<span class="_"> </span>while<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>size<span class="_"> </span>of<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>models</div><div class="t m0 x1 h5 y4 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws6">has<span class="_"> </span>constantly<span class="_"> </span>increased.<span class="_ _1"> </span>This<span class="_"> </span>means<span class="_"> </span>that<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>increase<span class="_"> </span>in<span class="_"> </span>performance<span class="_"> </span>is<span class="_"> </span>mostly<span class="_"> </span>driven</div><div class="t m0 x1 h5 y5 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws7">by<span class="_"> </span>data<span class="_"> </span>scaling,<span class="_"> </span>with<span class="_"> </span>variations<span class="_"> </span>in<span class="_"> </span>modelling<span class="_"> </span>becoming<span class="_"> </span>asymptotically<span class="_"> </span>less<span class="_"> </span>signiﬁcant.</div><div class="t m0 x1 h6 y6 ff3 fs1 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws8">Reproduced<span class="_"> </span>from<span class="_"> </span><span class="ff5 ls0">[</span><span class="fc2 ws9">HBE<span class="ff6 fs2 ls1 v1">+</span>24</span><span class="ff5 ls0">]</span>.</div><div class="t m0 x1 h7 y7 ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 wsa">are<span class="_"> </span>not<span class="_"> </span>explicitly<span class="_"> </span>considered<span class="_"> </span>in<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>training<span class="_"> </span>data<span class="_"> </span><span class="ff7 ls2">[</span><span class="fc2 wsb">ASA<span class="ff6 fs2 ls1 v1">+</span>22</span><span class="ff7 ls3">]</span>.<span class="_ _2"> </span>In<span class="_"> </span>fact,<span class="_"> </span>as<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>size</div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 y8 ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 wsc">of<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>datasets<span class="_"> </span>increases,<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>concept<span class="_"> </span>of<span class="_"> </span>what<span class="_"> </span>is<span class="_"> </span><span class="ff3 wsd">in-distribution<span class="_"> </span></span>and<span class="_"> </span>what<span class="_"> </span>is</div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 y9 ff3 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 wse">out-of-distribution<span class="_"> </span><span class="ff1 wsf">blurs,<span class="_"> </span>and<span class="_"> </span>large-scale<span class="_"> </span>models<span class="_"> </span>show<span class="_"> </span>hints<span class="_"> </span>of<span class="_"> </span>strong<span class="_"> </span>general-</span></div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 ya ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws10">ization<span class="_"> </span>capabilities<span class="_"> </span>and<span class="_"> </span>a<span class="_"> </span>fascinating<span class="_"> </span>low<span class="_"> </span>dependency<span class="_"> </span>on<span class="_"> </span>pure<span class="_"> </span>memorization,</div><div class="t m0 x1 h7 yb ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws11">i.e.,<span class="_"> </span><span class="ff2 ws12">overﬁtting<span class="_"> </span><span class="ff7 ls3">[</span></span><span class="fc2 wsb">PBE<span class="ff6 fs2 ls4 v1">+</span>22</span><span class="ff7 ls3">]</span>.</div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 yc ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws13">The<span class="_"> </span>emergence<span class="_"> </span>of<span class="_"> </span>extremely<span class="_"> </span>large<span class="_"> </span>models<span class="_"> </span>that<span class="_"> </span>can<span class="_"> </span>be<span class="_"> </span>leveraged<span class="_"> </span>for<span class="_"> </span>a<span class="_"> </span>variety</div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 yd ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws14">of<span class="_"> </span>downstream<span class="_"> </span>tasks<span class="_"> </span>(sometimes<span class="_"> </span>called<span class="_"> </span><span class="ff2 ws15">foundation<span class="_"> </span>models</span>),<span class="_"> </span>coupled<span class="_"> </span>with<span class="_"> </span>a</div><div class="t m0 x1 h8 ye ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws16">vibrant<span class="_"> </span>open-source<span class="_"> </span>community<span class="_ _0"></span>,<span class="fs2 fc2 ls5 v1">2</span>has<span class="_"> </span>also<span class="_"> </span>shifted<span class="_"> </span>how<span class="_"> </span>we<span class="_"> </span>interact<span class="_"> </span>with<span class="_"> </span>these</div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 yf ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws17">models.<span class="_ _3"> </span>Many<span class="_"> </span>tasks<span class="_"> </span>can<span class="_"> </span>now<span class="_"> </span>be<span class="_"> </span>solved<span class="_"> </span>by<span class="_"> </span>simply<span class="_"> </span><span class="ff3 ws18">prompting<span class="_"> </span></span><span class="ws19">(i.e.,<span class="_"> </span>interact-</span></div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 y10 ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws1a">ing<span class="_"> </span>with<span class="_"> </span>text<span class="_"> </span>or<span class="_"> </span>visual<span class="_"> </span>instructions)<span class="_"> </span>a<span class="_"> </span>pre-trained<span class="_"> </span>model<span class="_"> </span>found<span class="_"> </span>on<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>web</div><div class="t m0 x1 h9 y11 ff7 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls3">[<span class="ff1 fc2 ls7 wsb">ASA<span class="ff6 fs2 ls4 v1">+</span>22</span>]<span class="ff1 ls7 ws1b">,<span class="_"> </span>with<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>internals<span class="_"> </span>of<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>model<span class="_"> </span>remaining<span class="_"> </span>a<span class="_"> </span>complete<span class="_"> </span>black-box.</span></div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 y12 ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws1c">From<span class="_"> </span>a<span class="_"> </span>high-level<span class="_"> </span>perspective,<span class="_"> </span>this<span class="_"> </span>is<span class="_"> </span>similar<span class="_"> </span>to<span class="_"> </span>a<span class="_"> </span>shift<span class="_"> </span>from<span class="_"> </span>having<span class="_"> </span>to<span class="_"> </span>programs</div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 y13 ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws1d">your<span class="_"> </span>tools<span class="_"> </span>in,<span class="_"> </span>e.g.,<span class="_"> </span>C<span class="ff7 ws1e">++</span><span class="ws1f">,<span class="_"> </span>towards<span class="_"> </span>relying<span class="_"> </span>on<span class="_"> </span>open-source<span class="_"> </span>or<span class="_"> </span>commercial<span class="_"> </span>soft-</span></div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 y14 ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws20">ware<span class="_"> </span>whose<span class="_"> </span>source<span class="_"> </span>code<span class="_"> </span>is<span class="_"> </span>not<span class="_"> </span>accessible.<span class="_ _2"> </span>The<span class="_"> </span>metaphor<span class="_"> </span>is<span class="_"> </span>not<span class="_"> </span>as<span class="_"> </span>far<span class="_"> </span>fetched</div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 y15 ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws16">as<span class="_"> </span>it<span class="_"> </span>may<span class="_"> </span>seems:<span class="_ _2"> </span>nowadays,<span class="_"> </span>few<span class="_"> </span>teams<span class="_"> </span>worldwide<span class="_"> </span>have<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>compute<span class="_"> </span>and<span class="_"> </span>the</div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 y16 ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws21">technical<span class="_"> </span>expertise<span class="_"> </span>to<span class="_"> </span>design<span class="_"> </span>and<span class="_"> </span>release<span class="_"> </span>truly<span class="_"> </span>large-scale<span class="_"> </span>models<span class="_"> </span>such<span class="_"> </span>as<span class="_"> </span>the</div><div class="t m0 x1 h9 y17 ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws22">Llama<span class="_"> </span>LLMs<span class="_"> </span><span class="ff7 ls3">[</span><span class="fc2 wsb">TLI<span class="ff6 fs2 ls4 v1">+</span>23</span><span class="ff7 ls3">]</span><span class="ws23">,<span class="_"> </span>just<span class="_"> </span>like<span class="_"> </span>few<span class="_"> </span>companies<span class="_"> </span>have<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>resources<span class="_"> </span>to<span class="_"> </span>build<span class="_"> </span>en-</span></div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 y18 ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws24">terprise<span class="_"> </span>CRM<span class="_"> </span>software.</div><div class="t m0 x1 h2 y19 ff1 fs0 fc1 sc0 ls7 ws25">And<span class="_"> </span>in<span class="_"> </span>the<span class="_"> </span>same<span class="_"> </span>way<span class="_ _0"></span>,<span class="_ _2"> </span>just<span class="_"> </span>like<span class="_"> </span>open-source<span class="_"> </span>software<span class="_"> </span>provides<span class="_"> </span>endless<span class="_">
